title: Nebraska
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Nebraska

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Nebraska

You can apply for Medicaid in Nebraska by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Nebraska

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Nebraska

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Nebraska

CHIP in Nebraska

CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about CHIP in Nebraska.
